ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING , REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Dec-17-2013 Continued To Jan-21-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sheila Robello for John Warda (Trustee).

Ms. Robello stated that all of the loans by John Warda were paid off from escrow when they sold the one property, that the Trust pays the taxes the Beneficiaries incur from the income, that they receive a $1,500.00 monthly distribution and that they live in the property rent free. The Court will make an interim order regarding fees. Discussion was held on how interest on the loans was calculated and language in previuos orders regarding interest. The accounting petition was continued to January 21, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for further explanation on all of the interest payments.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #8, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jan-28-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Shiela Robello for and with John Warda.

Ms. Robello stated that they are having difficulty closing sale on the property, that the Buyers are backing out and that she will probably be coming in to reguest an order vacating the sale and remarketing the property. In addition, Ms. Robello stated they got all of the deeds, that they divided what was left into the subtrusts and that they preferred to keep the trust under Court supervision due to family dynamics. The accounting petition was taken under submission. The issue of funding of the subtrusts was continued to June 3, 2013.

Judge: Lillian Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1561 16th Avenue, San Francisco, Ca 94122)
Off Calendar Jan-15-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sheila Robello for and with John Warda, Jr. (Trustee).

The sale was confirmed at $1,060,000.00 subject to the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed December 6, 2012. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $292,000.00 is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #8, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Dec-17-2012 Continued To Jan-28-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Arthur Park for and with John Warda, Jr. (Trustee).

Mr. Warda stated that there is an offer in the amount of $1,060,000.00 on the 16th Avenue property, that the hearing is set for January 8, 2013, that his loans, his accrued interest and the equity line will be cleared, that this will leave only the first deed of Trust and that he will then establish/fund the two subtrusts. Mr. Warda also stated that there will be a reserve of $100,000.00 and that there will be about $100,000.00 left after the sale. The accounting petition was continued to January 28, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Park will file a supplement regarding the subtrusts.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
